Indices

  • General Index

Getting started

Installing SpaceNet and learning how to use it is easy. The user guide will introduce you to the key concepts of SpaceNet with useful background information and explanation.

Installation guide

API reference

The reference guide contains a detailed description of the SpaceNet API. The reference describes how the methods work and which parameters can be used.

To the documentation

Using SpaceNet

Examples of how to use SpaceNet for different applications can be found in the examples section. The examples are a great way to get started with SpaceNet and to learn how to use it for your own projects.

To the examples

Developer guide

Saw a typo in the documentation? Want to improve existing functionalities? The contributing guidelines will guide you through the process of improving SpaceNet.

See release notes
